title: Calibration I — Primaries
description: Portrait color bars. Every card hangs exactly as its file was provided — fitted to its own aspect ratio, tone mapping bypassed, never cropped or reinterpreted.

title: Calibration II — Spectrum
description: Landscape bars across the visible spectrum, plus white and black anchors.

title: Calibration III — Warm
description: Eight warm bands, deep oxide red to pale gold.

title: Calibration IV — Cool
description: A portrait descent from midnight blue to pale green water.

title: Calibration V — Grid
description: Square registration grid with center ring. Checks geometry, straightness, and glass reflection.

title: Calibration VI — Ramp
description: Ten-step grayscale ramp, black to white. Checks tonal neutrality of the museum lighting.

title: Calibration VII — Spectrum
description: Second spectrum card for the east wall sightline.

title: Calibration VIII — Warm
description: Warm bands, hung opposite the cool descent.

title: Calibration IX — Cool
description: Cool descent, hung opposite the warm bands.

title: Calibration X — Primaries
description: Portrait color bars closing the gallery sequence.

title: Calibration — The Threshold
description: Ultramarine field with registration grid and ring. At the threshold, the museum borrows this card's color: its light spills onto the concrete as you approach.
